mapper.sql: select id, user_id, achievement_id, progress, target_value, is_completed, completed_time, notification_sent, create_time, update_time from edu_user_achievement
mapper.insert: insert into edu_user_achievement (user_id, achievement_id, progress, target_value, is_completed, completed_time, notification_sent) values (#{userId}, #{achievementId}, #{progress}, #{targetValue}, #{isCompleted}, #{completedTime}, #{notificationSent})
mapper.delete: delete from edu_user_achievement where user_id = #{userId} and achievement_id = #{achievementId}
mapper.select: select count(*) from edu_user_achievement where user_id = #{userId} and is_completed = 1
